cards.rules_text:
Deathtouch
Force — {R}, {Q}: Darth Sidious deals 3 damage to any target. [i](Activate only once each turn.)[/i]
When Darth Sidious dies, you may put him into his owner's library third from the top.

Assembly 3 [i](This creature enters with three +1/+1 counters on it. When it dies, create a 1/1 colorless Construct artifact creature token for each counter on it.)[/i]
{T}, Remove a +1/+1 counter from Droideka: Put a shield counter on it. It deals 1 damage to any target. [i](If it would be dealt damage or destroyed, remove a shield counter from it instead.)[/i]

Energize [i](Each counter you remove from you or a permanent you control while casting this spell pays for {1}.)[/i]
Destroy target land. Destruction of Alderaan deals 20 damage to each untapped creature without flying.

Hexproof
When Luke enters, search your library for a land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.
Force — {X}, {Q}: Luke becomes an Avatar with base power and toughness X/X and gains indestructible. Exile him at the beginning of your next upkeep. [i](Activate only once each turn.)[/i]

Anakin crews Vehicles and stations Spacecraft as though his power were 2 greater.
Whenever Anakin becomes tapped, he or target artifact creature you control gain first strike until end of turn.

Ward {2}
Whenever a creature you control stations The Twilight, you may return it to its owner's hand.
Station [i](Tap another creature you control: Put charge counters equal to its power on this Spacecraft. Station only as a sorcery.)[/i]
[level 6+] Flying
You may activate The Twilight's station ability any time you could cast an instant. [4/2]

cards.rules_text:
Whenever Greedo enters or attacks, hunt target creature until end of turn. [i](Whenever a permanent you are hunting dies, create a Treasure token or trigger a bounty ability of a permanent you control.)[/i]
{1}: Greedo fights another target creature. Activate only as a sorcery.

When R2-D2 enters, if you cast it from your hand, the next legendary creature or Spacecraft spell you cast this turn costs {W}{U}{B}{R}{G} less to cast. This effect reduces only the amount of colored mana you pay.
Return R2-D2 to its owner's hand: Put a stun counter on target attacking creature. Activate only if R2-D2 is tapped.

Menace
Whenever another creature dies, put a +1/+1 counter on Anakin Skywalker. Then if Anakin Skywalker is tapped, you draw a card and lose 1 life.
If Anakin Skywalker would die, regenerate and transform him instead.
cards.rules_text2:
When this creature transforms into Darth Vader, destroy all other artifacts.
Menace, lifelink
Force — {B}, {Q}: Target creature gets -X/-X until end of turn and its controller loses X life, where X is the number of counters on Darth Vader. [i](Activate only once each turn.)[/i]

cards.rules_text:
Affinity for outlaws [i](This spell costs {1} less to cast for each Assassin, Mercenary, Pirate, Rogue, and/or Warlock you control.)[/i]
At the beginning of each upkeep, hunt target permanent until end of turn. [i](Whenever a permanent you are hunting dies, create a Treasure token or trigger a bounty ability of a permanent you control.)[/i]
Bounty — Put a +1/+1 counter on each outlaw you control.

Whenever Mos Eisley or a nontoken creature you control enters, hunt target creature until end of turn. [i](Whenever a permanent you are hunting dies, create a Treasure token or trigger a bounty ability of a permanent you control.)[/i]
{T}, Remove X gold counters from Mos Eisley: Add an amount of {C} equal to twice X.
Bounty — Put a gold counter on Mos Eisley.

Flying
Whenever Jango Fett attacks, hunt target nontoken creature until end of turn. [i](Whenever a permanent you are hunting dies, create a Treasure token or trigger a bounty ability of a permanent you control.)[/i]
Bounty — Create a token that's a copy of Jango Fett except its not legendary and loses all abilities.

When Supreme Commander Vader enters, create two 2/2 white Soldier creature tokens.
Deathtouch
Other creatures you control have exalted.
Force — {1}, {Q}: Permanents your opponents control lose hexproof, indestructible, and ward until end of turn. [i](Activate only once each turn.)[/i]

When Chewbacca enters, search your library for a Spacecraft card, reveal it, then shuffle and put that card on top.
Trample
Whenever Chewbacca is dealt damage, put a +1/+1 counter on him and proliferate.

Flash
Ward—Discard a card.
When Master Mace Windu enters, return target noncreature spell to its owner's hand.
Force — {1}{W}{U}{B}, {Q}: Return target creature to its owner's hand. Then that player discards a card. [i](Activate only once each turn.)[/i]

Double strike, haste
Whenever a creature dealt damage by General Grievous this turn dies, put a +1/+1 counter on General Grievous.
Sacrifice two artifacts: General Grievous phases out. [i](Treat it and anything attached to it as though they don't exist until its controller's next turn.)[/i]

Artifact creatures you control have haste.
At the beginning of combat on your turn, you may pay {X}. When you do, put a Spacecraft with mana value X or less from your hand onto the battlefield and put up to twice X charge counters on it. Return it and Han Solo to their owner's hands at the beginning of the next end step.

Tapped nonattacking creatures you control have hexproof.
Station [i](Tap another creature you control: Put charge counters equal to its power on this Spacecraft. Station only as a sorcery.)[/i]
[level 12+] Flying, first strike
{R}, Remove X counters from a tapped permanent you control: The Millenium Falcon deals X damage to target creature. [8/4]

cards.rules_text:
Grand Master Yoda can't be countered.
Force — {1}{G}, {Q}: Target creature has base power and toughness 4/4 until end of turn.
Force — {1}{U}, {Q}: Look at the top three cards of your library, then put them back in any order or shuffle. [i](Activate each force ability once each turn.)[/i]
The first force ability you activate each turn costs up to {Q} less to activate.

Whenever Luke Skywalker and at least one other creature become tapped, put a +1/+1 counter on Luke Skywalker.
Force — {G}, {Q}: Destroy target artifact or enchantment with mana value less than or equal to the number of counters on Luke Skywalker. If at least one permanent was destroyed this way, Luke Skywalker gains hexproof until end of turn. [i](Activate only once each turn.)[/i]

Whenever Princess Leia Organa attacks, choose a color. Create a 1/1 Rebel creature token of the chosen color.
Instant or sorcery spells you cast with one or more targets have conspire. [i](As you cast a spell with conspire, you may tap two untapped creatures you control that share a color with it. When you do, copy it.)[/i]

When Senator Mon Mothma enters, return another target creature to its owner's hand.
At the beginning of combat, if an opponent controls more creatures than you, you may pay {R} to exile Senator Mon Mothma and return her to the battlefield transformed under her owner's control.

cards.rules_text:
Lifelink
Whenever a creature you control becomes the target of a spell or ability for the first time each turn, put a shield counter on it.
Force — {2}{U}, {Q}: Until end of turn, if you would gain life, draw that many cards instead.

First strike
Creatures you control have “Ward—Pay 3 life.”
Force — {2}{U}, {Q}: Target player reveals X cards from their hand, where X is the amount of life they lost this turn. You may choose a card revealed this way. If you do, that player puts it on the bottom of their library. [i](Activate only once each turn.)[/i]

[i](As a Mission enters, choose an opponent to protect it.)[/i]
When Battle of Endor enters, create X 1/1 red Rebel creature tokens. If X is 5 or more, put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control.
When Battle of Endor is defeated, remove all counters from target noncreature permanent, then destroy it.

[i](As a Mission enters, choose an opponent to protect it.)[/i]
When Battle of Geonosis enters, gain control of target creature until Battle of Geonosis is defeated.
When Battle of Geonosis is defeated, create two tokens that are copies of target creature, except they're not legendary.

The Death Star II enters with a shield counter on it.
Station [i](Tap another creature you control: Put charge counters equal to its power on this Planet. Station only as a sorcery.)[/i]
[level 1+] {T}: Add {C}. If The Death Star II has a shield counter on it, add one mana of any color instead.
[level 8+] {T}: Exile The Death Star II and target permanent, then return The Death Star II to the battlefield tapped under its owner's control.

cards.rules_text:
At the beginning of your end step, untap all lands you control.
Nontoken creatures you control have “Force — {1}{G}, {Q}: Until end of turn, when this creature dies, return it to the battlefield tapped except it's an enchantment.” [i](It's no longer a creature. Activate a force ability only once each turn.)[/i]

Hunt target creature until end of turn. [i](Whenever a permanent you are hunting dies, create a Treasure token or trigger a bounty ability of a permanent you control.)[/i]
Put X shield counters on target hunted creature. For as long as it has a shield counter on it, it loses all abilities and is an artifact. [i](It's not a creature.)[/i]

{1}, {T}: Put a charge counter on Kyber Crystal, then copy target activated or triggered ability you control. You may choose new targets for the copy. Kyber Crystal deals X damage to you, where X is the number of charge counters on it.

Put a Spacecraft from your hand onto the battlefield, then destroy all artifacts you don't control and all enchantments you don't control. Put a charge counter on that Spacecraft for each permanent destroyed this way.

Target player gains control of target creature you control until end of turn. Untap that creature. Until end of turn, it gains haste, undying, and “This creature must attack each combat if able. Whenever it attacks, it fights another target creature you control.”

[i](As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.)[/i]
I, II — Search your library for a card, reveal it, put it in your hand, then shuffle. You lose life equal to its mana value. Put a bloodline counter on target creature.
III — Destroy target creature with two or more bloodline counters on it. When you do, your life total becomes equal to your starting life total.
​

I, II — Search your library for a card, reveal it, put it in your hand, then shuffle. You lose life equal to its mana value. Put a bloodline counter on target creature.
III — Destroy target creature with two or more bloodline counters on it. When you do, your life total becomes equal to your starting life total.

cards.rules_text:
Energize [i](Each counter you remove from you or a permanent you control while casting this spell pays for {1}.)[/i]
Target creature you control gets +X/+0 and gains first strike, hexproof, and indestructible. Take an extra turn after this one. At the beginning of that turn's end step, you lose the game.
